## Default Permission

Default permissions for the SpotSearch plugin

#### This default permission set includes the following:

- `allow-enable-indexing`
- `allow-index-items`
- `allow-delete-items`
- `allow-delete-domain`

## Permission Table

<table>
<tr>
<th>Identifier</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>


<tr>
<td>

`spotsearch:allow-delete-domain`

</td>
<td>

Enables the delete_domain command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`spotsearch:deny-delete-domain`

</td>
<td>

Denies the delete_domain command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`spotsearch:allow-delete-items`

</td>
<td>

Enables the delete_items command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`spotsearch:deny-delete-items`

</td>
<td>

Denies the delete_items command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`spotsearch:allow-enable-indexing`

</td>
<td>

Enables the enable_indexing command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`spotsearch:deny-enable-indexing`

</td>
<td>

Denies the enable_indexing command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`spotsearch:allow-index-items`

</td>
<td>

Enables the index_items command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`spotsearch:deny-index-items`

</td>
<td>

Denies the index_items command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>
</table>
